feat.name: Prophet's Lockbox
feat.text: You’ve learned secret methods that allow you to store your valuables where no one else can reach them. You can cast *imaginary lockbox* as a 5th-rank innate occult spell once per day. At 12th level and every 2 levels thereafter, the maximum amount you can target with this spell increases by 1 Bulk.

traits.name: Archetype
traits.text: This feat belongs to an archetype.
